mapper.select: select i.handover_item_id, i.handover_order_id, i.asset_id, i.asset_code, i.asset_name, i.from_dept_id, from_dept.dept_name as from_dept_name, i.from_user_id, ifnull(nullif(from_user.nick_name, ''), from_user.user_name) as from_user_name, i.from_location_name, i.to_dept_id, to_dept.dept_name as to_dept_name, i.to_user_id, ifnull(nullif(to_user.nick_name, ''), to_user.user_name) as to_user_name, i.to_location_name, i.before_status, i.after_status, i.create_by, i.create_time, i.update_by, i.update_time, i.remark from ast_asset_handover_item i left join sys_dept from_dept on i.from_dept_id = from_dept.dept_id left join sys_dept to_dept on i.to_dept_id = to_dept.dept_id left join sys_user from_user on i.from_user_id = from_user.user_id left join sys_user to_user on i.to_user_id = to_user.user_id where i.handover_order_id = #{handoverOrderId} order by i.handover_item_id asc
mapper.insert:
insert into ast_asset_handover_item ( handover_order_id, asset_id, asset_code, asset_name, from_dept_id, from_user_id, from_location_name, to_dept_id, to_user_id, to_location_name, before_status, after_status, create_by, remark, create_time ) values
( #{item.handoverOrderId}, #{item.assetId}, #{item.assetCode}, #{item.assetName}, #{item.fromDeptId}, #{item.fromUserId}, #{item.fromLocationName}, #{item.toDeptId}, #{item.toUserId}, #{item.toLocationName}, #{item.beforeStatus}, #{item.afterStatus}, #{item.createBy}, #{item.remark}, sysdate() )
